stemHtml:
A Lambert conformal conic chart with standard parallels at 54°N and 59°N is used for navigation. The straight line between A 55°00′.0N, 165° 00′.0E and B 58° 00′.0N, 154° 00′.0E is drawn in this chart. The True Track angle along the straight line in A is 301°.

Calculate the direction T of the straight line in position B.
